title: Walls: Reloaded
description: Improves walls with proper texture mapping; features a redesigned diorite texture, and adds multiple texture variations that apply consistently across blocks, stairs, slabs, and walls.
body:
# Walls: Reloaded
*Reimagines all brick and polished wall variants with proper texture mapping for top and bottom surfaces. Features a completely redesigned diorite texture that's more visually appealing than the vanilla version. Introduces 16 unique texture variations for cobblestone, granite, andesite, and diorite that seamlessly apply across all block forms including stairs, slabs, and walls.*

## Features
  - Remodeled all brick and polished wall variants for proper texture mapping
  - Completely redesigned diorite texture with improved aesthetics
  - Added 16 unique texture variations for cobblestone, granite, andesite, tuff, and diorite
  - These unique varations are used on all of the variants': blocks, stairs, slabs, and walls
  
## Installation
1. Download the resource pack
2. Place the .zip file directly in your resource packs folder
3. Activate in-game and enjoy!

## Credits
- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) by: Vanilla Tweaks Team
